name: Brave Search MCP
description: Search and retrieve web results through Brave Search for grounded assistant responses.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Configure Brave API credentials and mount the server in your MCP client config.

name: Filesystem MCP
description: Safely expose local file operations to MCP-compatible clients and assistants.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Define allowed directories and run the filesystem server from your MCP runtime.

name: Git MCP
description: Run repository-aware Git actions from an MCP client with explicit tool boundaries.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Point the server at target repositories and register it in your MCP config file.

name: GitHub MCP
description: Access GitHub issues, pull requests, and repository metadata through MCP.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Provide a GitHub token and attach the server to your MCP-enabled assistant.

name: Memory MCP
description: Store and retrieve structured memory for longer-lived agent interactions.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Set persistence options and map memory namespaces in your MCP deployment.

name: PostgreSQL MCP
description: Query and inspect PostgreSQL databases from MCP clients in a controlled way.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Set a connection string and scope queries with least-privilege database roles.

name: SQLite MCP
description: Lightweight SQLite connector for local datasets and embedded workflows.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Pass a database file path and enable query tools in your MCP client settings.

name: Slack MCP
description: Interact with Slack channels and messages from an MCP-integrated assistant.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Create a Slack app token and configure channel scopes for MCP usage.

name: Puppeteer MCP

installation: Install browser dependencies and run the Puppeteer MCP process via your client.

name: Sequential Thinking MCP
description: Provides structured reasoning helpers for stepwise planning in MCP workflows.

installation: Run the server as a tool provider and expose sequential planning methods.

name: Everything MCP
description: A comprehensive reference server demonstrating broad MCP tool coverage.

installation: Install dependencies and run as a template for custom MCP server builds.

name: Fetch MCP
description: Retrieve and normalize external URLs for MCP clients without custom wrappers.
author: modelcontextprotocol
installation: Expose controlled HTTP methods and headers from your MCP server config.

name: Magic MCP

installation: Clone the repo, configure environment variables, and run the bundled MCP service.
